name: Green, Lottie
description: Lottie has been with us three years, during which time she has won her way into the hearts and lives of us all. She fully measures up to what we regard as a noble young lady. We would be glad to keep her with us longer, but such pleasures are ruthlessly denied us by that inevitable happening—graduation.
text: Lottie has been with us three years, during which time she has won her way into the hearts and lives of us all. She fully measures up to what we regard as a noble young lady. We would be glad to keep her with us longer, but such pleasures are ruthlessly denied us by that inevitable happening—graduation.

name: Camp, Cecil
description: Rarely does any school number among its students a more loyal, ambitious, earnest and worthy one than Cecil. In literary society, in classroom, and on the athletic field, wherever found, she is ever bubbling over with school spirit and wholesome fun.
text: Rarely does any school number among its students a more loyal, ambitious, earnest and worthy one than Cecil. In literary society, in classroom, and on the athletic field, wherever found, she is ever bubbling over with school spirit and wholesome fun.

name: Long, Carrie
description: During her sojourn with us, Carrie has built up many friendships of that enduring kind which we all covet. We regret to lose her another year, but our loss is the gain of others with whom she will be associated henceforth. Being sincere, kind and true, her connection with us has been most kind and satisfactory.
text: During her sojourn with us, Carrie has built up many friendships of that enduring kind which we all covet. We regret to lose her another year, but our loss is the gain of others with whom she will be associated henceforth. Being sincere, kind and true, her connection with us has been most kind and satisfactory.

name: Arris, Owen
description: He has a sweet and tender voice And a dear loving smile; He takes special interest In a little "Fairchild."
text: He has a sweet and tender voice And a dear loving smile; He takes special interest In a little "Fairchild."

name: Nicie, Davis
description: Of all the things she'd rather be She'd rather be a Sailor; She thinks she'd get to go abroad With one boy—Oscar Taylor.
text: Of all the things she'd rather be She'd rather be a Sailor; She thinks she'd get to go abroad With one boy—Oscar Taylor.

name: Odessa, Pearce
description: When you see her smile widely And look sweeter than cakes, You may know she has news From her man at Great Lakes.
text: When you see her smile widely And look sweeter than cakes, You may know she has news From her man at Great Lakes.

name: Ye, Adams
description: She's some class editor, You bet it! The Juniors of '18 she attempted to edit, She sighed and she moaned And she shed some big tears, When she thought of the futures Of their awful careers.
text:
"Constancy" "Modesty" "Cutey" "Roots"
She's some class editor, You bet it! The Juniors of '18 she attempted to edit, She sighed and she moaned And she shed some big tears, When she thought of the futures Of their awful careers.

name: Lewis, Grace
motto: "She's hunting a husband, One of great fame; A 'regular heart smasher' Is her middle name."
text: "She's hunting a husband, One of great fame; A 'regular heart smasher' Is her middle name."

name: Taylor, Doswell
motto: "He's attentive and studious, But no end of a flirt; Just call him a 'slacker,' And his feelings you'll hurt."
text: "He's attentive and studious, But no end of a flirt; Just call him a 'slacker,' And his feelings you'll hurt."

name: Hurst, Margaret
motto: "Her long-suit is eating Mashed potatoes and gravy, But while she devours it Her heart's in the navy."
text: "Her long-suit is eating Mashed potatoes and gravy, But while she devours it Her heart's in the navy."

name: Wallace, Mary
description: She is very nice looking And not at all bad, But she can't keep her seat When she hears the name "Frad."
text: She is very nice looking And not at all bad, But she can't keep her seat When she hears the name "Frad."

name: Simms, Mary
description: You'll notice she's not very small in size, She works every day to try to get wise; She's indeed very lucky in securing a beau, And her ideal husband is one Mr. Lowe.
text: You'll notice she's not very small in size, She works every day to try to get wise; She's indeed very lucky in securing a beau, And her ideal husband is one Mr. Lowe.

name: Beene, Julia
description: She is indeed very handsome and tall, When a good time is coming She answers the call; If she's treated unfair She has nothing to say, But she goes to her parlor And a rag she doth play.
text: She is indeed very handsome and tall, When a good time is coming She answers the call; If she's treated unfair She has nothing to say, But she goes to her parlor And a rag she doth play.
